mapper.select: SELECT rr.*, b.bed_no, r.room_no, r.floor_id, f.floor_name, r.building_id, eb.building_name FROM elder_room_reserve rr LEFT JOIN elder_bed b ON rr.bed_id = b.id LEFT JOIN elder_room r on r.id = rr.room_id LEFT JOIN elder_floor f on f.id = r.floor_id LEFT JOIN elder_building eb on eb.id = r.building_id WHERE rr.del_flag = 0 and rr.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY rr.create_time DESC limit 1

SELECT rr.* , b.bed_no, r.room_no, f.floor_name, be.building_name FROM `elder_room_reserve` rr LEFT JOIN elder_bed b ON b.id = rr.bed_id LEFT JOIN elder_room r on r.id = rr.room_id LEFT JOIN elder_floor f on f.id = r.floor_id LEFT JOIN elder_building be on be.id = r.building_id WHERE rr.del_flag = 0
AND rr.`status` = #{data.status}
AND rr.`consulting_id` LIKE concat(concat('%',#{data.consultingId}),'%')
AND rr.`customer_id` = #{data.customerId}
AND b.bed_no LIKE concat(concat('%',#{data.bedNo}),'%')
AND r.room_no LIKE concat(concat('%',#{data.roomNo}),'%')
AND rr.create_time BETWEEN concat(#{data.createTimeArr[0]},' 00:00:00') AND concat(#{data.createTimeArr[1]},' 23:59:59')
order by rr.create_time desc
